description: Example webhook payloads for POST /webhook/linkedin-ai-post. Copy any object as the request body.

auth.note: Required when WEBHOOK_SECRET is set in n8n environment

examples.name: topic_only_full_ai
examples.description: Let the workflow generate both caption and image from a topic. Best for AI assistant integrations.

payload.topic: How AI agents are transforming no-code automation in 2026

examples.name: topic_publish
examples.description: Generate and publish immediately. Use after previewing with dry_run.

payload.topic: 5 lessons I learned building production n8n workflows

examples.name: full_caption_and_image_prompt
examples.description: Provide your own caption; workflow generates the image only.

payload.caption:
The future of work isn't humans vs. AI — it's humans *with* AI.

Here are 3 ways teams are shipping faster without burning out:

→ Automate repetitive ops with n8n
→ Use AI for first drafts, humans for judgment
→ Measure outcomes, not hours

What's your biggest automation win this quarter?

#FutureOfWork #Productivity #AI
payload.image_prompt: Professional LinkedIn infographic: hybrid human-AI collaboration, clean blue and white design, abstract office setting, no text overlay, modern flat illustration

examples.name: caption_with_image_url
examples.description: Publish pre-generated content. Image must be publicly accessible JPEG/PNG.

payload.caption:
Just shipped an open-source n8n workflow that posts AI-generated content to LinkedIn in one webhook call.

Fork it, customize it, automate your feed.

#OpenSource #n8n #LinkedIn #Automation

examples.name: preview_before_publish
examples.description: Always preview first. Returns caption metadata without hitting LinkedIn.

payload.topic: Why webhook-driven AI workflows beat manual social scheduling

examples.name: minimal
examples.description: Smallest valid payload — AI fills in the rest.

payload.topic: Industry insights on B2B marketing automation trends

examples.name: caption_with_base64
examples.description: Provide base64 image data (JPEG/PNG). Supports data URI prefix.

payload.caption:
Sharing a visual I created for our automation stack overview.

#Automation #n8n

examples.name: generate_only_no_publish
examples.description: Generate caption + image but do not post (publish: false).

payload.topic: Weekly automation tip: preview before you publish

examples.name: caption_only_preview
examples.description: Fast caption preview — skips AI image generation to save API cost.

payload.topic: Why dry_run saves money on DALL-E calls

response_preview.caption: Preview caption text...
response_preview.message: Preview only — set dry_run: false to publish.
